diagrams.title: UX Metrics Classification
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy of UX metrics divided into behavioral vs attitudinal and quantitative vs qualitative categories
elements: Behavioral Metrics (Time on Task, Error Rate, Conversion Rate, Task Success Rate, Click Paths)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding metric categories and their relationships

diagrams.title: NPS Calculation Flowchart
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process for calculating Net Promoter Score from user responses
diagrams.purpose: Learning how to compute and interpret NPS scores

diagrams.title: SUS Score Interpretation Scale
diagrams.description: Visual scale showing how SUS scores correspond to usability quality
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for interpreting SUS scores in evaluations

diagrams.title: UX Evaluation Methods Overview
diagrams.description: Comparison of different UX evaluation methods and their characteristics
elements: Usability Testing: With real users, task-based, quantitative + qualitative
Heuristic Evaluation: Expert review, principles-based, quick and inexpensive
Analytics Review: Automated data collection, behavioral metrics only
A/B Testing: Comparative, data-driven, optimization focused
diagrams.purpose: Choosing appropriate evaluation methods for different scenarios
